description: Canonical Bardock-Xenoverse-Villains captor-captive related_characters bidirectional mirror-closure. Bardock is canonically captured by Towa (Time Breaker scientist-witch) at the moment-just-before-his-death-at-Frieza's-Supernova and fitted with a Demon-Realm Dark-Ki control mask, becoming the Masked Saiyan / Xeno Bardock — the canonical Time-Breaker-aligned dark-ki warrior weaponized against the Time Patrol across Dragon Ball Online (2010), Dragon Ball Heroes (2010+), and Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 (2016). The wave-69 bardock.md commission listed xenoverse-villains in related_characters at creation time; xenoverse-villains.md did not previously list bardock because no bardock node existed pre-wave-69. This is the canonical mirror-closure: both nodes are equal character-layer nodes, both endpoints traversable from either side, captor-captive relation is canonically established across three Bandai-canon game/MMO titles plus the canonical Dragon Ball Wiki Masked Saiyan Saga page. Standard Edgelord professional sigh applies. The mirror is structural — bundle copy referencing the canonical post-death-extraction-of-value-from-the-worker's-reanimated-corpse Xenoverse-Bardock-thesis (the canonical extended-exploitation moment that follows the canonical worker-killed-by-employer-empire moment) indexes both nodes. The three corpus prints BT4-117 + SD3-04 + SD3-01 are all triple-anchored at [xenoverse-villains, saiyan, bardock] per the wave-69 dual-pointer commission, making the bidirectional related_characters wiring structurally load-bearing for any future Time-Patrol-or-Masked-Saiyan-themed bundle.
